name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Default
description: Form input pattern with a standard baseline structure for general-purpose use.

name: With helper text
description: Form input pattern with field with helper and validation guidance text below input.

name: With icon
description: Form input pattern with icon-plus-label actions for clearer intent cues.

name: With addon
description: Form input pattern with input with prefixed or suffixed addon elements.

name: Textarea
description: Form input pattern with multi-line text entry field for longer responses.

name: Select
description: Form input pattern with dropdown select control for predefined option lists.

name: Floating Label
description: Form input pattern with floating label pattern that moves on focus or input.

name: Checkboxes & Radios
description: Form input pattern with grouped checkbox and radio controls for multi/single choice.
